boss_pitch: A giant, aggressively fashionable great white shark terrorizes a winter resort town by freezing the water and judging people's flimsy outerwear.
boss_original_quote: You're gonna need a bigger boat.
boss_punned_quote: You're gonna need a bigger coat.

boss_pitch: A ruthless mafia don tries to monopolize the local stand-up comedy scene by forcing rival club owners to sit through his mob enforcers' notoriously terrible open-mic routines until they surrender.
boss_original_quote: I'm gonna make him an offer he can't refuse.
boss_punned_quote: I'm gonna make him an offer he can't amuse.

boss_pitch: Armed with a .44 Magnum breathalyzer, a rogue vice detective aggressively interrogates inebriated bar patrons to enforce the city's strict last-call laws.
boss_original_quote: You've gotta ask yourself one question: 'Do I feel lucky?' Well, do ya, punk?
boss_punned_quote: You've gotta ask yourself one question: 'Do I feel lucky?' Well, do ya, drunk?

boss_pitch: A brave group of rebel space-dentists battles an evil, sugar-obsessed Empire to stop the dreaded Death Cavity from bringing ultimate tooth rot to the galaxy.
boss_original_quote: May the Force be with you.
boss_punned_quote: Decay the Force be with you.

boss_pitch: A disgruntled temp vendor  hijacks the corporate intercom system to furiously denounce the Human Resources department and their abysmal lack of dental benefits.
boss_original_quote: I'm as mad as hell, and I'm not going to take this anymore!
boss_punned_quote: I'm as mad as personnel, and I'm not going to take this anymore!

boss_pitch: An insomniac dumpster scavenger descends into madness as he patrols the gritty city streets, convinced that the piles of scattered rubbish are striking up conversations with him.
boss_original_quote: You talkin' to me?
boss_punned_quote: You talkin' to debris?

boss_pitch: A crazed geometry teacher drafted into the Vietnam War becomes obsessed with mapping out the exact, non-intersecting mathematical trajectories of airstrikes.
boss_original_quote: I love the smell of napalm in the morning.
boss_punned_quote: I love parallel of napalm in the morning.

boss_pitch: A winter caretaker slowly goes mad from cabin fever and transforms into an aggressively hospitable Italian chef who violently chops down bathroom doors just to serve his terrified family artisanal pasta.
boss_original_quote: Heeere's Johnny!
boss_punned_quote: Heeere's Giovanni!

boss_original_title: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back
boss_pun_title: Star Boars: The Ham-pire Slices Back
boss_pitch: In a galaxy far, far away, a young farm boy discovers the horrifying truth that the dark lord ruling the universe is actually a sentient, honey-baked pork product.
boss_original_quote: No, I am your father.
boss_punned_quote: No, I ham your father.

boss_pitch: A stranded alien tries to build a communication array in a suburban backyard, but faces his greatest challenge yet: navigating strict local zoning laws and getting approval from the Homeowners Association.
boss_original_quote: E.T. phone home.
boss_punned_quote: E.T. zone home.

boss_pitch: A ruthless Miami crime lord violently takes over the city's classical music scene, aggressively forcing his rivals to keep time with his tiny, pocket-sized metronome.
boss_original_quote: Say hello to my little friend!
boss_punned_quote: Say tempo to my little friend!

boss_pitch: Doc Brown and Marty travel through time in a steam-powered locomotive, quickly realizing that the space-time continuum has zero need for train tracks.
boss_original_quote: Roads? Where we're going, we don't need roads.
boss_punned_quote: Railroads? Where we're going, we don't need railroads.

boss_pitch: A fierce space zoologist battles a terrifying swarm of hairless, cold-blooded extraterrestrial reptiles to protect her remarkably fluffy, warm-blooded galactic pet from being violently shaved.
boss_original_quote: Get away from her, you bitch!
boss_punned_quote: Get away from fur, you bitch!

boss_pitch: When an elite academy of stoner aviators gets drafted to fly supersonic jets, they must battle extreme G-forces to deliver a high-velocity harvest of premium sativa.
boss_original_quote: I feel the need—the need for speed!
boss_punned_quote: I feel the weed—the weed for speed!

boss_pitch: A swashbuckling fantasy epic where a vengeful swordsman tracks down the rogue labor boss who forcibly unionized his father into the local tradesman collective.
boss_original_quote: Hello. My name is Inigo Montoya. You killed my father. Prepare to die.
boss_punned_quote: Hello. My name is Inigo Montoya. You guild my father. Prepare to die.

boss_pitch: When heavily armed rogue 18-wheeler drivers take over a massive commercial freight depot, an off-duty cop must use his CB radio and barefoot pedal-shifting skills to save the convoy.
boss_original_quote: Yippee-ki-yay, motherfucker.
boss_punned_quote: Yippee-ki-yay, mother trucker.

boss_pitch: An Iowa farmer is compelled by mysterious whispers to plow over his corn crop and build a massive gazebo so the ghosts of a legendary barbershop quartet can return to aggressively hum in perfect harmony.
boss_original_quote: If you build it, he will come.
boss_punned_quote: If you build it, he will hum.

boss_pitch: A brilliant but extremely thirsty serial killer terrorizes the countryside by slurping entire major waterways dry, leaving nothing behind but quiet reservoirs and confused beavers.
boss_original_quote: I ate his liver with some fava beans and a nice Chianti.
boss_punned_quote: I ate his river with some fava beans and a nice Chianti.

boss_pitch: A hardened military colonel takes over a chaotic toddler daycare and quickly realizes his intense interrogation tactics are entirely useless against hyperactive three-year-olds.
boss_original_quote: You can't handle the truth!
boss_punned_quote: You can't handle the youth!

boss_pitch: A slow-witted but profoundly endearing Southern man inadvertently becomes the most sought-after obstetrician in American history, marveling at the unpredictability of delivering babies while offering assorted truffles to women in labor.
boss_original_quote: My mama always said life was like a box of chocolates. You never know what you're gonna get.
boss_punned_quote: My mama always said midwife was like a box of chocolates. You never know what you're gonna get.

boss_pitch: A lethal cyborg sent from the future to destroy humanity gets a remote office job instead, abandoning his mission to spend his days endlessly updating his chat status and avoiding real work.
boss_original_quote: I'll be back.
boss_punned_quote: I'll be slack.

boss_pitch: An aging mob boss pivots his crime syndicate into a multi-level marketing empire for essential oils, ruthlessly intimidating retail rivals with weaponized aromatherapy pods.
boss_original_quote: I'm gonna make him an offer he can't refuse.
boss_punned_quote: I'm gonna make him an offer he can't diffuse.

boss_pitch: A maritime mob boss conducts his ruthless organized crime strictly from a luxury mega-boat, eliminating rivals by forcing them to go on all-inclusive tropical vacations they are completely unable to decline.
boss_original_quote: I'm gonna make him an offer he can't refuse.
boss_punned_quote: I'm gonna make him an offer he can't cruise.

boss_pitch: When a ruthless mafia don decides to rig the Stanley Cup, his enforcers bypass assassination entirely and just kidnap the rival team's star netminder.
boss_original_quote: Leave the gun. Take the cannoli.
boss_punned_quote: Leave the gun. Take the goalie.

boss_pitch: A giant, gun-toting great white shark challenges the local beach town sheriff to a high-noon shootout at sea, prompting the crew to wrangle a custom western-style vessel.
boss_original_quote: You're gonna need a bigger boat.
boss_punned_quote: You're gonna need a trigger boat.

boss_pitch: A terrifyingly pedantic great white shark terrorizes a coastal town's newspaper staff for their terrible grammar and lack of citations, forcing the editor-in-chief to realize their current punctuation standards aren't enough to survive.
boss_original_quote: You're gonna need a bigger boat.
boss_punned_quote: You're gonna need a bigger quote.

boss_pitch: When a massive, PR-disaster of a shark starts eating tourists, Amity Island's incompetent politicians desperately grasp at straws to find an innocent bystander to take the blame for their gross negligence.
boss_original_quote: You're gonna need a bigger boat.
boss_punned_quote: You're gonna need a bigger scapegoat.

boss_pitch: A gigantic, carnivorous root beer float threatens to drown a 1950s diner in sticky sweetness, forcing the local soda jerk to upgrade his beverage-drinking arsenal.
boss_original_quote: You're gonna need a bigger boat.
boss_punned_quote: You're gonna need a bigger float.

boss_pitch: When a sleepy farming community is terrorized by a massive, sentient patch of man-eating kudzu, the local sheriff realizes their standard petting-zoo livestock won't be enough to graze it into submission.
boss_original_quote: You're gonna need a bigger boat.
boss_punned_quote: You're gonna need a bigger goat.

boss_pitch: A giant, sentient television set terrorizes a small beach community by broadcasting endless horrible reality shows, forcing the local sheriff to realize they need a massive clicker to change the channel.
boss_original_quote: You're gonna need a bigger boat.
boss_punned_quote: You're gonna need a bigger remote.

boss_pitch: An unhinged, insomniac notary roams the gritty city streets, violently drafting new legislation and confronting anyone who disobeys his freshly stamped executive orders.
boss_original_quote: You talkin' to me?
boss_punned_quote: You talkin' to decree?

boss_pitch: An unhinged 1970s news anchor sparks a televised communist uprising when he begins aggressively demanding the proletariat seize the means of broadcast production.
boss_original_quote: I'm as mad as hell, and I'm not going to take this anymore!
boss_punned_quote: I'm comrade as hell, and I'm not going to take this anymore!

boss_pitch: An unhinged financial television anchor goes rogue on live TV, inciting a massive retail investor rebellion against a powerful Wall Street hedge fund.
boss_original_quote: I'm as mad as hell, and I'm not going to take this anymore!
boss_punned_quote: I'm as mad as Citadel, and I'm not going to take this anymore!

boss_pitch: A band of rebel IT technicians battles the Galactic Empire's terrible server bandwidth by downloading the universe's mystical energy field into their browser's temporary files.
boss_original_quote: May the Force be with you.
boss_punned_quote: Cache the Force be with you.

boss_pitch: A farm boy must learn the ancient ways of cosmic knitting to stop a dark empire from unraveling the literal fabric of the universe.
boss_original_quote: May the Force be with you.
boss_punned_quote: Fray the Force be with you.

boss_pitch: A sci-fi epic where mathematically obsessed space rebels must use geometry and exact fractions to defeat the evil Galactic Calculus Empire.
boss_original_quote: May the Force be with you.
boss_punned_quote: May the Fourths be with you.

boss_pitch: A farm boy must save the galaxy from an evil empire by learning the ancient ways of space-Vikings, rowing a cosmic longship to the Death Star, and trusting in the power of Odin.
boss_original_quote: May the Force be with you.
boss_punned_quote: May the Norse be with you.

boss_pitch: A rogue military commander travels deep into the jungle to negotiate with a ruthless crime syndicate that has cornered the illicit market on morning-delivered weaponized incendiary jelly.
boss_original_quote: I love the smell of napalm in the morning.
boss_punned_quote: I love the cartel of napalm in the morning.

boss_pitch: A gritty war epic where a platoon's deadliest mission is escorting a parasol-twirling Southern debutante who uses incendiary bombs as atmospheric lighting for her jungle debutante ball.
boss_original_quote: I love the smell of napalm in the morning.

boss_original_title: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back
boss_pun_title: Star Chords: The Amplifier Strikes Back
boss_pitch: Instead of Jedi training, Luke Skywalker travels to a swamp planet to learn the mystical art of sound engineering from a tiny green record producer who strictly forbids the use of cheap volume-boosting effects.
boss_original_quote: Do. Or do not. There is no try.
boss_punned_quote: Do. Or do not. There is no amplify.

boss_original_title: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back
boss_pun_title: Star Drawers: The Empire Strikes Tacks
boss_pitch: An ancient green master teaches an impatient farm boy the mystic arts of assembling confusing Swedish flat-pack furniture without stripping the hardware.
boss_original_quote: Do. Or do not. There is no try.
boss_punned_quote: Screw. Or screw not. There is no try.

boss_pitch: After developing a severe addiction to Earth's frozen dairy treats, a stranded alien builds an interstellar intercom to demand a waffle-wrapped dessert delivery to his suburban hideout.
boss_original_quote: E.T. phone home.
boss_punned_quote: Ice cream cone home.

boss_pitch: A wild-eyed inventor and his teenage farmhand build a plutonium-powered combine harvester to travel back in time and plant heirloom seeds before a greedy agribusiness can pave over their land.
boss_original_quote: Roads? Where we're going, we don't need roads.
boss_punned_quote: Roads? Where we're sowing, we don't need roads.

boss_pitch: A time-traveling tailor uses a heavily modified, steam-powered sewing machine to speed through time, desperately stitching up ripped space-time continuums and historical fashion faux pas.
boss_original_quote: Roads? Where we're going, we don't need roads.
boss_punned_quote: Pants? Where we're sewing, we don't need pants.

boss_pitch: Elite Wall Street stockbrokers attend a high-octane aviation academy where they dogfight in fighter jets over hostile takeovers and offshore accounts to see who can hoard the most cash.
boss_original_quote: I feel the need—the need for speed!
boss_punned_quote: I feel the need—the need for greed!

boss_pitch: A swashbuckling revenge tale where a passionate swordsman tracks down the six-fingered man who killed his father, only to force him into a lifetime of strict corporate obedience and adherence to the employee handbook.
boss_original_quote: Hello. My name is Inigo Montoya. You killed my father. Prepare to die.
boss_punned_quote: Hello. My name is Inigo Montoya. You killed my father. Prepare to comply.

boss_pitch: A lovestruck farm boy tries to win the heart of a demanding mermaid by embarking on an epic, swashbuckling quest to fetch her the ocean's most obnoxious, self-centered crustaceans.
boss_original_quote: As you wish.
boss_punned_quote: As you shellfish.

boss_pitch: After hearing mysterious whispers, an Iowa farmer builds a massive fruit-paring station in his cornfield, convinced it will summon the ghost of a legendary giant plum.
boss_original_quote: If you build it, he will come.
boss_punned_quote: If you build it, he will plum.

boss_pitch: A slow-witted but incredibly dedicated botanist realizes his prize-winning fern is dying of shade, forcing him to desperately sprint across town chasing moving patches of sunlight to keep it alive.
boss_original_quote: Run, Forrest, run!
boss_punned_quote: Sun, Forrest, sun!

boss_pitch: A ruthless but fabulous Cuban refugee violently takes over the Miami textile underworld, aggressively pushing his favorite blue-purple fabrics onto rival fashion designers.
boss_original_quote: Say hello to my little friend!
boss_punned_quote: Say indigo to my little friend!

boss_pitch: After accidentally disrespecting the Mother Superior, a slow-witted but lovable man spends decades sprinting across American history to escape a relentless, ruler-wielding sisterhood.
boss_original_quote: Run, Forrest, run!
boss_punned_quote: Nun, Forrest, nun!

boss_pitch: During a tense corporate tribunal, a rookie lawyer grills a hardened Yankee Candle executive about an illegal double-wicking cover-up.
boss_original_quote: You can't handle the truth!
